title: Cree Summer

{{Person

|name=Cree Summer
|birth=[[July 7]], [[1960s#1969|1969]]<ref name="SWYoutube">{{ThisWeek|R1_2b23sJRM|Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising Excerpt, the Sounds of Ben Burtt, and More!}}</ref>

'''Cree Summer''' (born [[July 7]], [[1960s#1969|1969]]) provided the voice of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] for the first season of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] and [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] for the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' cartoon. She also portrayed [[Hylo Visz]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire]]'' and [[Marlaa Jinara]] in ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures]]''. Some of her most famous non–''Star Wars'' work includes voicing Penny for the original ''Inspector Gadget'' cartoons and voicing Elmyra for ''Tiny Toon Adventures''. She also did the voice of Max in the Batman continuation series entitled ''Batman Beyond''. She has recorded voices for programs from many different studios like [[Wikipedia:Film Roman|Film Roman]], [[Wikipedia:Hanna-Barbera|Hanna-Barbera]], [[Cartoon Network]] and Nickelodeon. She has also had a musical career, releasing a solo R&B album and touring as an opening act for [[Wikipedia:Lenny Kravitz|Lenny Kravitz]].

Her father, [[Don Francks]], performed multiple voices in the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|Droids]] and [[Ewoks (television series)|Ewoks]] cartoon series.
